enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2.1 Banknotes tendered over the counter shall be examined for authenticity through machines.
enriched_requirements.object: through machines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Similarly, banknotes received directly at the back office / currency chest through bulk tenders shall also be examined through machines.
enriched_requirements.object: machines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2.3 In no case, the Counterfeit Notes shall be returned to the tenderer or destroyed by the bank branches.
enriched_requirements.object: tenderer or destroyed by the bank branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Impounding of Counterfeit Notes
Notes determined as counterfeit shall be stamped as "COUNTERFEIT NOTE" and impounded in the prescribed format (Annex I).
enriched_requirements.object: NOTE" and impounded in the prescribed format (Annex I)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Each such impounded note shall be recorded under authentication, in a separate register.
enriched_requirements.object: in a separate register

conditions: When a banknote tendered at the counter of a bank branch / back office and currency chest is found to be counterfeit
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: When a banknote tendered at the counter of a bank branch / back office and currency chest is found to be counterfeit, an acknowledgement receipt in the prescribed format (Annex II) must be issued to the tenderer, after stamping the note as in paragraph 3 ibid.
enriched_requirements.object: tenderer, after stamping the note as in paragraph 3 ibid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The receipt, in running serial number, shall be authenticated by the cashier and tenderer.
enriched_requirements.object: cashier and tenderer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Notice to this effect shall be displayed prominently at the offices / branches for information of the public.
enriched_requirements.object: the offices / branches for information of the public

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The following procedure shall be followed while reporting incidence of detection of Counterfeit Notes to the Police:
enriched_requirements.object: incidence of detection of Counterfeit Notes to the Police:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.1 For cases of detection of Counterfeit Notes up to four (04) pieces in a single transaction, a consolidated report in the prescribed format (Annex III) shall be sent by the Nodal Bank Officer to the police authorities or the Nodal Police Station, along with the suspect Counterfeit Notes, at the end of the month.
enriched_requirements.object: Nodal Bank Officer to the police authorities or the Nodal Police Station, along with the suspect Counterfeit Notes, at the end of the m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.2 For cases of detection of Counterfeit Notes of five (05) or more pieces in a single transaction, the Counterfeit Notes shall be forwarded immediately by the Nodal Bank Officer to the local police authorities or the Nodal Police Station for investigation by filing FIR in the prescribed format (Annex IV).
enriched_requirements.object: the Nodal Bank Officer to the local police authorities or the Nodal Police Station for investigation by filing FIR in the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.3 A copy of the monthly consolidated report / FIR shall be sent to the Forged Note Vigilance (FNV) Cell constituted at the Head Office of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Forged Note Vigilance (FNV) Cell constituted at the Head Office of the bank

conditions: If the Counterfeit Notes are sent to the police by insured post
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If the Counterfeit Notes are sent to the police by insured post, acknowledgement of receipt thereof by the police shall be invariably obtained and kept on record.
enriched_requirements.object: kept on record

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In case any difficulty is faced by the banks due to reluctance of the police to receive monthly consolidated statement / file FIRs, the matter may be sorted out in consultation with the Nodal Officer of the police authority designated to coordinate on matters relating to investigation of Counterfeit Note cases.
enriched_requirements.object: consultation with the Nodal Officer of the police authority designated to coordinate on matters relating to investigation of Counterf

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The list of Nodal Police Stations may be obtained from the concerned Issue Office of RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned Issue Office of RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.6 Banks shall also monitor the patterns / trends of such detection and suspicious trends / patterns and bring to the notice of RBI / police authorities immediately.
enriched_requirements.object: / trends of such detection and suspicious trends / patterns and bring to the notice of RBI / police authorities immediately

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: and problems therein, shall be discussed regularly in the meetings of various State Level Committees viz., State Level Bankers' Committee (SLBC), Standing Committee on Currency Management (SCCM), State Level Security Committee (SLSC), etc.
enriched_requirements.object: the meetings of various State Level Committees viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.8 The data on detection of Counterfeit Notes by banks shall be included in the monthly returns forwarded to the concerned Issue Office of RBI as indicated in para 10 below.
enriched_requirements.object: monthly returns forwarded to the concerned Issue Office of RBI as indicated in para 10 below

conditions: In case of suspected foreign currency note received for opinion from the police and government agencies
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of suspected foreign currency note received for opinion from the police and government agencies, etc., they shall be
<image>

6.1 The banks shall re-align their cash management in such a manner so as to ensure that banknotes in the denominations of ₹100 and above are not put into re-circulation without the notes being machine processed for authenticity.
enriched_requirements.object: in such a manner so as to ensure that banknotes in the denominations of ₹100 and above are not put into re-circulation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The said instructions shall be applicable to all bank branches, irrespective of the volume of daily cash receipt.
enriched_requirements.object: bank branches, irrespective of the volume of daily cash receipt

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: This shall also be applicable to White Level ATM Operators in terms of circular DPSS.CO.OD.No.1916/06.07.011/2018-19 dated March 7, 2019.
enriched_requirements.object: White Level ATM Operators in terms of circular DPSS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 6.3 Detection of Counterfeit Notes in chest remittances is also liable to be construed as wilful involvement of the chest branches concerned in circulating Counterfeit Notes and may attract special investigation by police authorities, and other action like suspending the operation of the chest concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: police authorities, and other action like suspending the operation of the chest concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Each bank shall designate a Nodal Bank Officer, district-wise to serve as the contact point for all Counterfeit Note detection related activities and notify the same to the concerned Issue Office of the RBI and police authorities.
enriched_requirements.object: Officer, district-wise to serve as the contact point for all Counterfeit Note detection related activities and notify the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: All cases of reporting of Counterfeit Note detection as indicated in Para 5 shall be done through the Nodal Bank Officer.
enriched_requirements.object: Nodal Bank Officer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 8.1 Each bank shall establish at its Head Office, a Forged Note Vigilance (FNV) Cell to undertake the following functions:
enriched_requirements.object: Office, a Forged Note Vigilance (FNV) Cell to undertake the following functions:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 8.2 FNV Cell shall submit a status report on a half-yearly basis (as at the end of March and September every year), as per the format prescribed in Annex VII, by e- mail, to the Chief General Manager, Department of Currency Management, RBI, Central Office, Amar Building, Fourth Floor, Sir P.
enriched_requirements.object: on a half-yearly basis (as at the end of March and September every year), as per the format prescribed in Annex VII, by e- mail

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 8.3 In order to update the record of the addresses of the FNV Cells, the bank shall furnish by e-mail, in the prescribed format (Annex V), the particulars to the Chief General Manager, Department of Currency Management, Reserve Bank of India and to the concerned Issue office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the FNV Cell is functional, by 15th of April, every year.
enriched_requirements.object: the prescribed format (Annex V), the particulars to the Chief General Manager, Department of Currency Management, Reserve Bank o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 9.1 With a view to facilitate the detection of Counterfeit Notes, all bank branches / identified back offices shall be equipped with ultra-violet lamps / other appropriate banknote sorting / detection machines.
enriched_requirements.object: lamps / other appropriate banknote sorting / detection machines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In addition, all currency chest branches shall be equipped with verification, processing and sorting machines and shall be used to their optimum capacity.
enriched_requirements.object: processing and sorting machines and shall be used to their optimum capacity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Such machines shall conform to the guidelines on 'Note Authentication and Fitness Sorting Parameters' prescribed by the RBI from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: on 'Note Authentication and Fitness Sorting Parameters' prescribed by the RBI from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 9.2 The banks shall maintain a daily record of the notes processed through the Note Sorting machines, including the number of counterfeits detected.
enriched_requirements.object: of the notes processed through the Note Sorting machines, including the number of counterfeits detected

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 9.3 The banks shall also consider providing at least one counting machine (with dual display facility) for public use at the counter.
enriched_requirements.object: least one counting machine (with dual display facility) for public use at the counter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Data on Counterfeit Notes detected by all branches and currency chests of the bank shall be compiled and reported by FNV Cell of the concerned bank to the Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the FNV Cell is functional.
enriched_requirements.object: by FNV Cell of the concerned bank to the Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the FNV Cell is functional

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The reporting shall be made in the format (Annex VI) on monthly basis, by 7th of the following month.
enriched_requirements.object: format (Annex VI) on monthly basis, by 7th of the following month

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In case, no counterfeit note has been detected during the month, a "Nil" report shall be sent.

conditions: where Counterfeit Notes have been detected to FIU-IND
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 10.2 Under Rule 8 (1) of Prevention of Money Laundering (Maintenance of Records) Amendment Rules, 2013, Principal Officers of banks shall report information on cash transactions where Counterfeit Notes have been detected to FIU-IND, by the 15th day of the succeeding month, by uploading the information on the FINnet Portal.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions where Counterfeit Notes have been detected to FIU-IND, by the 15th day of the succeeding month, by uploading t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Similarly, data on Counterfeit Notes detection shall be uploaded on the web-enabled software of NCRB, New Delhi on their website.
enriched_requirements.object: web-enabled software of NCRB, New Delhi on their website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 11.1 Counterfeit Notes received back from the police authorities / courts shall be carefully preserved in the safe custody of the bank and a record thereof be maintained by the branch / CC concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: the safe custody of the bank and a record thereof be maintained by the branch / CC concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: FNV Cell of the bank shall also maintain a branch / CC- wise consolidated record of such Counterfeit Notes.
enriched_requirements.object: / CC- wise consolidated record of such Counterfeit Notes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 11.2 These Counterfeit Notes at branches / CCs shall be subjected to verification on a half-yearly basis (on 31st March and 30th September) by the Officer-in-Charge of the bank concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: on a half-yearly basis (on 31st March and 30th September) by the Officer-in-Charge of the bank concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: They shall be preserved for a period of three years from the date of receipt from the police authorities.
enriched_requirements.object: period of three years from the date of receipt from the police authorities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 11.3 Counterfeit Notes, which are subject matter of litigation in the court of law shall be preserved with the branch / CC concerned for three years after conclusion of the court case.
enriched_requirements.object: branch / CC concerned for three years after conclusion of the court case

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 11.4 After the preservation period, such notes shall be sent to the concerned Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the branch / CC is functioning, with full details of the case.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the branch / CC is functioning, with full details of the case

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 12.3 The controlling offices / training centres shall also organise / conduct training programmes on the security features of genuine Indian banknotes for all bank personnel handling cash to enable detection of Counterfeit Notes at the point of receipt itself.
enriched_requirements.object: training programmes on the security features of genuine Indian banknotes for all bank personnel handling cash to enable detect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These trainings shall cover detection, impounding and reporting of Counterfeit Notes.
enriched_requirements.object: reporting of Counterfeit Notes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: determined as a counterfeit one, shall be branded with a stamp "COUNTERFEIT
enriched_requirements.object: stamp "COUNTERFEIT

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: following inscription may be used.

In case, it is decided to file criminal proceedings in the court of law, you may first arrange to send the notes to any of the Note Printing Presses, Forensic Science Laboratories, etc., in terms of the provisions of Section 292(1) and 292(3) of the Code of Criminal Procedure for examination.
enriched_requirements.object: the notes to any of the Note Printing Presses, Forensic Science Laboratories, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The expert opinion furnished may be produced in the court as evidence under Section 292 of the Criminal Procedure Code.
enriched_requirements.object: court as evidence under Section 292 of the Criminal Procedure Code

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The forged notes may please be returned to us after the completion of the investigation and/or proceedings in the court of law along with the detailed report of the investigation / decision of the court.
enriched_requirements.object: us after the completion of the investigation and/or proceedings in the court of law along with the detailed report of the invest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: NB: The completed format, in MS-Excel, shall be transmitted by e-mail to dcmfnvd@rbi.org.in and to the concerned Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the FNV Cell is functional, by 15th April every year.
enriched_requirements.object: to dcmfnvd@rbi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The dates of such correspondence made by FNV Cell with police authorities may be furnished.
Colour of the thread shall shift from green to blue when viewed from different angles.
enriched_requirements.object: blue when viewed from different angles

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Withdrawn
